title: Monday eMail Notifications sent to Outlook
excerpt: It would be great if there was an integration between Monday.com Inbox and MS-Outlook.  Any email sent to the Monday Inbox will get forwarded to MS-Outlook.

posts.author: jgroman2 (John Roman)
posts.cookedHtml: It would be great if there was an integration between Monday.com Inbox and MS-Outlook. Any email sent to the Monday Inbox will get forwarded to MS-Outlook.
